message:
test(send): Add unit tests for batch file parsing (bd-3kmf)

Add comprehensive test coverage for the batch send feature:
- TestParseBatchFile: tests batch file parsing with various formats
  (one-per-line, separator format, comments, empty lines)
- TestRemoveComments: tests comment removal helper
- TestTruncateForPreview: tests preview truncation helper

Close bd-3kmf: ntm send --batch feature is complete with:
- Batch file parsing (one-per-line and --- separator formats)
- --delay option for rate limiting
- --confirm-each for interactive confirmation
- --stop-on-error to halt on first failure
- --broadcast to send same prompt to all agents
- --agent to target specific pane
- Agent filtering via --cc/--cod/--gmi/--tag
- Ctrl+C graceful handling with summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
